  "rationale": {"R1.1": "The revision clarifies the problem and contribution more effectively, but could benefit from a stronger articulation of the gap between existing work and the proposed approach.", "R1.4": "Identifies one prior work (soft penalty approaches) and contrasts it with the new constrained formulation, but doesn't map against a broader set of related works.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty about the direction of the deployment gap and the exact meaning of 'toward 90%' commitment.", "RX.3": "The revision stays within the scope of improving the original text.", "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content introduced.", "RX.5": "Provides some rationale for changes but lacks detailed source annotations for all modifications."},

rationale.R1.1: The revision clarifies the problem and contribution more effectively, but could benefit from a stronger articulation of the gap between existing work and the proposed approach.
rationale.R1.4: Identifies one prior work (soft penalty approaches) and contrasts it with the new constrained formulation, but doesn't map against a broader set of related works.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about the direction of the deployment gap and the exact meaning of 'toward 90%' commitment.
rationale.RX.3: The revision stays within the scope of improving the original text.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some rationale for changes but lacks detailed source annotations for all modifications.
